response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and demonstrates technical leadership through roles involving system design, architecture, and mentorship. However, his people management experience is limited to volunteer and informal settings, and his background in developer tools/build systems is not explicitly highlighted. His experience in mobile platforms is also minimal. The role requires mid-to-senior management with strong people-leadership skills, which may be a gap.
strengths: Strong technical background with experience in system design, architecture, and performance optimization
Proven track record in software development across multiple languages and domains (web, mobile, embedded systems)
Experience in developer tooling and CI/CD infrastructure, including setting up GitLab instances and deployment pipelines
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (no clear team leadership or performance management roles)
No explicit experience in mobile platform ecosystems or developer tools like compilers/release systems
Lack of organizational change leadership experience, which is preferred for the role

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and mobile platform experience
